use_codes.desc: METHOD OF INHIBITING LIPOXYGENASE ACTIVITY IN A MAMMAL WHICH IS THE MODE OF ACTION IN THE TREATMENT OF ASTHMA

indications.text:
ZYFLO is indicated for the prophylaxis and chronic treatment of asthma in adults and
children 12 years of age and older.

ZYFLO CR is a leukotriene synthesis inhibitor indicated for the prophylaxis ADVERSE REACTIONS

pharyngolaryngeal pain. (6.1)
